{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/privacy-federation/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "privacy-federation"
tags:
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. privacy-federation

_Файлов:_ 5

h2. Содержание

* [[00-question-anonymization|00-question-anonymization.md]] — 
* [[01-what-to-anonymize-german-standard|01-what-to-anonymize-german-standard.md]] — 
* [[02-two-tier-publication|02-two-tier-publication.md]] — 
* [[03-what-this-gives-technically|03-what-this-gives-technically.md]] — > [!WARNING]
* [[04-what-i-can-do-now|04-what-i-can-do-now.md]] —

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.29)

* [[README]] (сходство 0.23)
